Journeys final stop is to visit the highly endangered Red Colobus monkeys. Learn why these human-like primates eat dirt for survival.

programme.title: Journeys in Africa

programme.title: Journeys in Africa
programme.desc: Nicknamed the Garden of Eden, this volcanic caldera is home to over 25,000 big game animals. Here survival isn't just a game—it's a matter of life and death. programme.title: Native Operation
programme.desc: First, Matt and Lou confront an ungentlemanly drunk at an upscale gentleman's club in an effort to repossess his late model BMW. Then, Sonia and Matt head over to the wrong side of the tracks to reclaim a motorcycle from a different kind of biker. And finally, Matt and Froy cross the border into a nearby reservation to wrangle with a belligerent debtor and two unimpressed representatives of the tribal police.

programme.title: T-Bone Trouble
programme.desc: The team's work with anger management starts to pay off - with disastrous consequences. Matt and Sonia get into a standoff with a wealthy divorcee, his daughter and her raging boyfriend.

programme.title: Getting the Axe
programme.desc: Tensions between Lou and Matt continue to boil when Matt enlists his daughter's aid on another job.

programme.title: The Junior Partner
programme.desc: Now that Lou has accepted Matt's offer to buy into the company, the team is back in action, but there are still some unanswered questions. Sonia, Lyndah, and Froy interrupt a rich kid's brunch party to take away his ride, Matt and Lyndah attempt to repo an unusual vehicle from a man who thinks he's Uncle Sam, and Lou and Matt are in a losing match with an unruly gang of jacked-up rugby players.

programme.title: Unwanted Seizures
programme.desc: First, Lou sends Sonia and Matt to repo a Toyota Corolla from a recently divorced debtor determined to keep the car she won in the divorce. Later, Lou cuts a repo short to send Froy and Matt to tail a car until the debtor realizes he's being followed. And Finally, when a debtor goes into a seizure during his seizure of his vehicle, Lou, Sonia, and Lyndah tend to the man while they wait for help to arrive.

programme.title: Repo Basher vs. Matt
programme.desc: Matt, Froy, and Lou get a tip on a car whose owner has a boyfriend known for taking his fists to repossessors. Then, Lou and Matt derail an international expedition when they haul off with a tourist bus. And, Sonia and Froy bring some unwanted heat to a promotion for an energy drink by trying to repo the marketing truck.

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: After we meet the team members of Operation Repo, Matt, Lou, and Froy get interrupted by a bike riding gangster while trying to hook up a car. And later, Matt, Sonia, and Froy deal with an ecstatic and energetic young debtor who will not let go of her car.

programme.title: Froy Gets Beat Up
programme.desc: Sonia and Lou see the signs of the bad economy first-hand when a rich couple willing give up their late-model Landcruiser. Then, Matt and Sonia need to contend with a spoiled princess whose daddy forgot to pay the bill on her Jetta.

programme.title: A Vengeful Streak
programme.desc: Matt and Ronnie repo a Porsche from a maniac Carlos and Ronnie come face to face during their repo of a cable van.

programme.title: The Canals of Deceit
programme.desc: First, Sonia and Froy get messy when they head to Venice Beach to track down and recover a canoe from the world-famous canals. Then, Lyndah and Sonia confront a distraught widow with a terrible secret. And finally, there's no time-out for Lou and Matt when a posse of soccer players get physical to protect their precious and unpaid-for Camaro

programme.title: Suspicious Packages
programme.desc: Sonia and Froy repo a hummer from a bachelorette who is down to party, but when the cops arrive it's the repo team who is in for a shock.

programme.title: The Big Letdown
programme.desc: Froy meets with a lawyer, but his legal troubles are worse than expected. Sonia and Froy confront a debtor who uses a homeless man in his ploy to keep his car. Then, Sonia and Froy discover one debtor's alcoholism is only a farce to cover a bigger secret. And finally, the team's attempt to repo fifteen bikes from a gym is not the morale booster Lou had hoped for.

programme.title: Russian Roulette
programme.desc: Matt and Sonia take on an award winning fencing coach, but all bets are off when his students go on the offensive with real swords.

programme.title: Burgers, Bottles, and Hustlers
programme.desc: Lou and Sonia repo a compact sedan from a trio of gun-wielding, bottle-breaking gangsta gals. Then, Matt and Froy get some fast food when they deal with an irate burger-slinger who won't honor Matt's order for his car. Finally, Sonia and Froy come face-to-face with a small time hustler and a gaggle of ladies in his employ.

programme.title: Up Up and Away
programme.desc: First, it's up, up, and away, for Lou, Froy, and Matt. All of their skills are tested when they attempt to take down not one, but two hot air balloons. Then, Lou and Froy find themselves in the wrong part of town, repo'ing a sports car from a former gang member who's not afraid to go back to jail. Finally, Lou and Lyndah break in Frankie, the new guy, with a repo that turns into a confrontation with three spray-paint-packing graffiti girls.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Thrifty Week with Bobby Flay, The Old Gays, Drew's News
programme.desc: Drew kicks-off thrifty week, dedicating a whole week to learning the secrets to saving money and sharing inexpensive cooking hacks and budget-friendly design ideas. World-renowned chef Bobby Flay joins Drew to whip up his own version of a Juicy Lucy Pimento Cheeseburger from his new cookbook, “Beat Bobby Flay.” Then, four friends who have become a social media sensation, The Old Gays, help Drew interpret some popular slang phrases. Plus, an all-new Drew's News where Drew and Ross Mathews serve the news sunny-side up.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Valentine's Day Show, Gayle King, Taye Diggs, Chris Appleton
programme.desc: It's Drew's Valentine's Day Show where the entire studio audience is filled with singles looking to make a love connection. “CBS Mornings” Co-Anchor Gayle King joins Drew and Ross Mathews at the news desk for a super-sized Drew's News. Plus, “All American” star Taye Diggs stops by to chat and gives a few of the singles in the audience some advice with a quick round of “Drew's Love Bug.” Then, celebrity hairstylist Chris Appleton is on-hand to help one newly single viewer get a fresh start with a brand-new look. Plus, Drew is surprising one couple with an engagement re-do.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by her friend "Shazam!Fury of the Gods" star Lucy Liu and she's dishing on some of her iconic roles like "Charlie's Angels" and "Kill Bill."

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Hilary Swank, Drew's News with "Ghosts" Star Utkarsh Ambudkar, In A Minute Drew's News Podcast Preview with Jay Shetty
programme.desc: "Alaska Daily" star Hilary Swank joins Drew to chat. Plus, "Ghosts" stars Utkarsh Ambudkar is helping serve the news sunny-side up by joining Drew at the news desk. Then, In A Minute Drew shares a sneak peek of her all-new Drew's News Podcast with guest Jay Shetty.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: “Queen of the Universe” Judges Vanessa Williams, Michelle Visage and Trixie Mattel, Drew-Gooder, Cookbook Author Mary McCartney
programme.desc: “Queen of the Universe” judges Vanessa Williams, Michelle Visage and Trixie Mattel sit down with Drew. Then, in an all new Drew-Gooder, Drew is surprising a deserving person who is changing the lives of others. Plus, cookbook author and star of “Mary McCartney Serves It Up,” Mary McCartney shares her favorite cookie recipe.

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.sub-title: Padma Lakshmi, Love Bug: Digital Dating at Any Age, Drew's News
programme.desc: “Taste the Nation” host Padma Lakshmi joins Drew and shares some hidden gems she's found across the country. Plus, Shirley Temple King Leo Kelly joins Drew and Padma to taste test the tomato sauce from Padma's new book, “Tomatoes for Neela.” Then, dating coach Damona Hoffman is stopping by to share tips on navigating digital dating at any age. Plus, Drew and Ross Mathews are serving the news sunny-side up in an all new Drew's News.

programme.title: From Russia With Lev
programme.desc: From Executive Producer Rachel Maddow and Director Billy Corben, "From Russia With Lev" reveals the outrageous scheme that led to former President Donald Trump's first impeachment. It follows the much, much larger-than-life journey of Lev Parnas, a Ukrainian-born hustler and former small-time mafia operator whose random, almost accidental association with Trump and Trump attorney Rudolph Giuliani took him around the world, and ultimately to prison. Lev reveals the ham-handed workings of the furtive campaign to dredge up false but damaging allegations against then-candidate Joe Biden. Directed by Billy Corben.

programme.title: Trump: The Criminal Conspiracy Case
programme.desc: A documentary exploring Donald Trump's increasingly audacious attempts to allegedly overturn the result of the 2020 US Election.

programme.title: Shouting Down Midnight
programme.desc: In 2013, women shared real stories to help Texas State Senator Wendy Davis filibuster in defense of Texas women's access to reproductive healthcare. As the capitol filled to capacity for the first time in its history, and people all over the world tuned in, Sen. Davis read testimony from women strongly opposed to the bill which would effectively force draconian, pre-Roe v. Wade conditions on women again. The bill ultimately passed, but not before Texas women - and the men who love them - made it clear that day that the Texas legislature had gone too far.Forcing debate on the bill provided citizens a view of the process and a role in demanding accountability from their elected representatives. People were activated. Lives were transformed. History was made.

programme.title: The Wildlife Docs
programme.desc: Bzui, a Malayan tiger, has created a new bloodline by giving birth to three cubs two males and one female at Busch Gardens Tampa. But one of the male cubs is sick so everyone is watching and waiting to see if he will survive. Then, three baby lion cubs arrive from South Africa and are being hand raised by the Animal Care Specialists. Just like humans, these babies eat a lot, love playtime, and it's time for their vaccinations. Plus, we'll catch up with the world's fastest land animal, the cheetah! Discover the lengths taken to breed these cats, and an unlikely pair becomes fast friends.

programme.title: The Thing
programme.desc: In remote Antarctica, a group of American research scientists are disturbed at their base camp by a helicopter shooting at a sled dog. When they take in the dog, it brutally attacks both human beings and canines in the camp and they discover that the beast can assume the shape of its victims. A resourceful helicopter pilot (Kurt Russell) and the camp doctor (Richard Dysart) lead the camp crew in a desperate, gory battle against the vicious creature before it picks them all off, one by one.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Repairmen Val McKee (Kevin Bacon) and Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) are tired of their dull lives in the small desert town of Perfection, Nev. But just as the two try to skip town, they happen upon a series of mysterious deaths and a concerned seismologist (Finn Carter) studying unnatural readings below the ground. With the help of an eccentric couple (Reba McEntire, Michael Gross), the group fights for survival against giant, worm-like monsters hungry for human flesh.

programme.title: Tremors II: Aftershocks
programme.desc: After spending all the reward money from his first encounter with the giant man-eating worms called Graboids, Earl Bassett (Fred Ward) agrees to hunt more of the deadly creatures at a Mexican oil refinery for $50,000 each. Knowing that he cannot face the monsters alone, Earl recruits Burt Gummer (Michael Gross), another veteran of the incident in Nevada, to supply the firepower. There is only one problem: The Graboids have now evolved to attack above ground.

programme.title: The Werewolf of London
programme.desc: While in Tibet researching a mysterious flower that purportedly takes its strength from the moon, botanist Wilfred Glendon (Henry Hull) is bitten by a strange creature. Back in London, Glendon becomes absorbed in his research of the plant, and is annoyed by the appearance of fellow scientist Dr. Yogami (Warner Oland), who reveals that the plant is the only known temporary antidote for werewolves. Glendon remains skeptical until the next full moon, when he undergoes a startling transformation.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.sub-title: Crane Cannon Launch/Trash Scavenger Hunt/Heli Body Drag
programme.desc: This episode featured four pairs as teams. First, it's the human cannonball. As a truck drives along a pier with a crane hanging off the side, one team member hangs from a crane and then into the water they light the fuse to giant cannon. Their partner is shot out of the cannon and into the water, swim to a boat and clip a flag to a flagpole. The team to finish fastest chooses team to be eliminated. Next, it's a trash can buffet scavenger hunt. Teams dig through dumpsters and barrels to find items. The team to match four items fastest would win a four-day trip to Las Vegas and $20,000. No one would be eliminated. The final stunt is a real drag. Team members hanging on to handlebars attached to a helicopter and are dragged across pavement on their stomachs. They have to let go as close to the finish line as possible. The team to get the least combined distance from the finish line would win $50K. The home invasion stunt goes to Dubuque, Iowa.
